created_for: Phase 7X-2L local idea batch testing demo

ideas.hypothesis: A morning that leaves the first range can be checked with fixed local rules.
ideas.exact_rule_definition: Use the first 15 regular-session minutes, then check the next fixed local move.
ideas.why_test_this: It is simple and local bars can check it.
ideas.useful_result_definition: Useful would mean the same fixed rule repeats across several local securities.
ideas.failed_or_unclear_result_definition: Unclear means examples split between helpful and unhelpful outcomes.
ideas.safety_notes: This is a locked local hypothesis only.

ideas.hypothesis: A morning that opens away from a prior reference point can be checked for a move back toward it.
ideas.required_data: Local one-minute first-hour bars and a prior reference level.
ideas.exact_rule_definition: Use a fixed opening gap threshold before checking the next fixed local move.
ideas.why_test_this: The idea is simple enough to check without live data.
ideas.useful_result_definition: Useful would mean enough local examples repeat across more than one security.
ideas.failed_or_unclear_result_definition: Unclear means there are too few examples or the outcomes split.
ideas.safety_notes: The batch can only ask EdgeLab to test fixed local rules.

ideas.hypothesis: SPY and QQQ pointing different ways early can be checked as a local pair idea.
ideas.required_data: Same-date local one-minute first-hour bars for SPY and QQQ.
ideas.exact_rule_definition: Use a fixed early comparison window and check the next fixed local move.
ideas.why_test_this: It is a simple pair relationship that EdgeLab already has local files for.
ideas.useful_result_definition: Useful would mean the pair behavior repeats clearly enough for deeper research.
ideas.failed_or_unclear_result_definition: Unclear means the pair behavior splits or does not appear often.
ideas.safety_notes: The idea is research-only and must be tested locally.

ideas.hypothesis: Calendar moon phases are outside the local first-hour rule set.
ideas.required_data: External calendar context not included in EdgeLab local bars.
ideas.exact_rule_definition: No deterministic local first-hour rule is available for this idea.
ideas.why_test_this: This record checks that unsupported ideas are rejected safely.
ideas.useful_result_definition: Useful would require a supported deterministic local rule first.
ideas.failed_or_unclear_result_definition: Failure means EdgeLab cannot test it with current local rules.
expected_failure_modes: EdgeLab cannot test this idea with current local rules
ideas.safety_notes: EdgeLab must reject this idea until a deterministic local rule exists.

ideas.hypothesis: This idea claims it will work.
ideas.why_test_this: This unsafe record should be rejected before testing.
ideas.useful_result_definition: This record should not reach a useful result.
ideas.safety_notes: This intentionally unsafe fixture verifies validation.
